Tests the Math.acos function to verify it returns +0.0 when the input is 1.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.acos` function in JavaScript. It checks that the arccosine of 1 returns positive zero (`+0.0`). This test ensures that the `Math.acos` function conforms to the expected mathematical result for this specific input. The script uses a single assertion to validate this behavior, indicating narrow functionality focused on a specific mathematical operation.
